message:
fix(goose): add ~/.config/goose detection probe and sync tilde paths (closes #4)

Add the XDG config path (~/.config/goose/) as a detection probe since
that's where Goose stores config.yaml, enabling detection even before
any sessions exist. Also sync default_probe_paths_tilde to include all
paths from default_probe_roots (~/.goose/ was missing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
